articles.title: ‘You can stop your war’: Zelenskyy’s open letter to Putin – in full
articles.description: Russians are increasingly tired of the conflict and the time to end it is now, Ukraine’s president tells his Russian counterpart in an open letter Volodymyr Zelenskyy, in an open letter to the Vladimir Putin, has called for a face-to-face meeting with the Russian president to end his war against Ukraine. The letter sets out Zelenskyy’s view of the four-year-old conflict and says that while Ukrainians’ resilience remains intact, most Russians have grown weary of its effects and are ready for peace. articles.title: U.S. denies sanctions caused Cuba’s crisis as UN warns of worsening shortages
articles.description: NEW YORK, NEW YORK - MAY 07: US Ambassador to the United Nations (UN) Mike Waltz speaks to reporters after the passing of a UN Security Council draft resolution on the situation with ships in the Strait of Hormuz at UN Headquarters on May 07, 2026 in New York City. The draft resolution threatens Iran with sanctions or other measures if it fails to halt attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz, which has become the center of contention between the US and Iran. (Photo by Spencer Platt/Getty Images)
